description: This pipeline reads in and prepares z-stacks for processing. The main steps include reading in the z-stacks, selecting the relevant slices, and preparing them for further analysis.

d138d5f3-e448-4c24-9af9-03f784d525aa.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

d0441f0b-05a6-4237-8520-ccc11c7d508d.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
d0441f0b-05a6-4237-8520-ccc11c7d508d.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

66090fc8-6bd2-4de7-9f99-ddf0c2cfc17a.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
66090fc8-6bd2-4de7-9f99-ddf0c2cfc17a.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D
